summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VisaXpert landing page changes. All 4 specified changes have been successfully implemented and verified on the live site.
passed_tests: Form headline correctly shows 'Unlock Your Complimentary Profile Assessment'

Founder section correctly shows 'Mr. Sunil Arora' and 'CEO, VisaXpert'
Logo scrolling animation working with correct 8s duration (3x speed increase from 25s)
University Change page at /university-change loads correctly
Dashboard at /dashboard loads and login works with provided credentials
All page navigation and routing working correctly
Form elements and interactions functioning properly
